goals.text: Romanian deadlift 205 lbs for 5 reps with perfect hinge mechanics
goals.notes: Primary lower body strength goal. His hinge is elite — now it's just progressive loading.

goals.text: Receive orthopedic clearance for overhead pressing
goals.notes: AC joint impingement — currently restricted to horizontal patterns only. Following orthopedic timeline.

goals.text: Single-arm cable press 40 lbs for 3 sets of 10 each side
goals.notes: Horizontal pushing to compensate for overhead restriction. Good scapular stability now allows meaningful loading.
